nasb.text: So when the crowd saw that Jesus was not there, nor His disciples, they themselves got into the small boats, and came to Capernaum seeking Jesus.

esv.text: So when the crowd saw that Jesus was not there, nor his disciples, they themselves got into the boats and went to Capernaum, seeking Jesus.

cnv.text: 群眾見耶穌和門徒都不在那裡，就上船往迦百農去找耶穌。

ccb.text: 他们发现耶稣和门徒都不在那里，就乘船到迦百农去找祂。

csbs.text: 这样，众人一发现耶稣已经不在那里，连他的门徒们也不在那里，就上了船，往迦百农去找耶稣。
